channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump seeks permanent approval for 15% ethanol-gas blend
item.description: E15 is typically available only part of the year under an EPA waiver to help lower high gas prices.

item.title: Mamdani-backed candidates sweep New York primaries
item.description: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani demonstrated political influence as all three of his endorsed congressional candidates won their primaries for November.

item.title: Trump meets GOP senators after rejecting housing bill
item.description: President Trump's sudden decision not to sign a major bipartisan housing bill highlighted growing tensions with Republican lawmakers.

item.title: Earnings potential for a $45,000 CD account now
item.description: A CD account can generate substantial interest earnings in just a few months. Here is what savers need to know.
